title: Hierarchical PGO: stable hier block costs
body:
~~Requires https://github.com/verilator/verilator/pull/6212~~

To avoid `PROFOUTOFDATE` error when using `--prof-pgo` in the hierarchical mode, cost stabilization of hier blocks is needed.
To keep PGO flow unchanged, that is to require a single verilation with `--prof-pgo` and a single simulation to gather profiling data, I propose the following solution: use original costs of hierarchical DPI calls for scheduling top level mtasks, for the rest of the mtasks use profiling data.

## Old internal PGO hierarchical flow
1. Verilate design with `--prof-pgo`, create hier blocks.
2. Verilate hierarchical blocks with `--prof-pgo`.
3. Verilate top module with hierarchical wrappers.
4. Simulation run dumps costs of mtasks inside hier blocks, non-hierarchical tasks in the main module and hierarchical DPI calls to hier blocks.
5. Verilate design with `profile.vlt` file with costs.

Outcome: MTask hashes of the main module hierarchical DPI calls are mismatched as their internal costs (inside hier blocks) changed thus top level mtasks changed also.

## New internal PGO hierarchical flow
1. Verilate design with `--prof-pgo`, create hier blocks.
2. Verilate hierarchical blocks with `--prof-pgo`, forward costs of hierarchical blocks to `VlPgoProfiler`.
3. Verilate top module with hierarchical wrappers.
4. Simulation run dumps costs of mtasks inside hier blocks, non-hierarchical tasks in the main module and the original cost of each hierarchical block (from `VlPgoProfiler`).
5. Verilate design with `profile.vlt` file with costs. 

Outcome: Hierarchical blocks fetched previously dumped mtask costs, top module fetched costs of top level mtasks, hierarchical DPI calls used old costs to avoid mtask hash mismatches.

## RTLMeter benchmark
`--threads 6`

config.vlt
```verilog
`verilator_config
hier_block -module "AXI4UserYanker_1"
hier_block -module "AXI4UserYanker_2"
hier_block -module "AXI4UserYanker_3"
hier_block -module "FastArbiter_1"
hier_block -module "FastArbiter_2"
hier_block -module "FastArbiter_3"
hier_block -module "FastArbiter_4"
hier_block -module "TLLogger_1"
hier_block -module "TLPLIC"
hier_block -module "RefillBuffer"
hier_block -module "SourceD"
hier_workers -module "AXI4UserYanker_1" -workers 2
hier_workers -module "AXI4UserYanker_2" -workers 2
hier_workers -module "AXI4UserYanker_3" -workers 2
hier_workers -module "FastArbiter_1" -workers 2
hier_workers -module "FastArbiter_2" -workers 2
hier_workers -module "FastArbiter_3" -workers 2
hier_workers -module "FastArbiter_4" -workers 2
hier_workers -module "TLPLIC" -workers 2
hier_workers -module "RefillBuffer" -workers 2
hier_workers -module "SourceD" -workers 2
`verilog
```

A - verilator master with `--prof-pgo` https://github.com/verilator/verilator/commit/98b8d43a4ae52dba9d42422e61c76c52be5d5c0d
B - this implementation
